name: Salisbury Steaks
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Condensed beef broth (10 oz each)
2 Cans Mushroom stems and pieces (4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, bread crumbs, salt, pepper, and eggs in a bowl until combined.
2. Shape the mixture into 8 oval patties, each about 3/4 inch thick.
3. Cook the patties in a large skillet over medium heat, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides (about 10 minutes). Drain excess fat if needed.
4. Add sliced onions and condensed beef broth to the skillet. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and add mushroom pieces. Simmer until the beef is cooked through, about 10 minutes more.
6. Remove patties from the skillet and keep warm.
7. Mix cold water and cornstarch in a separate bowl.
8. Return the skillet to medium-low heat. Stir in the water-cornstarch mixture into the onion broth, boiling for 1 minute.
9. Serve the sauce over the cooked Salisbury steaks.
